questions: how to become a ux designer
what does a ux designer do
best way to learn ux design
answers: UX design (User Experience Design) is about making products easy and enjoyable to use. It focuses on understanding users' needs and creating smooth, intuitive interactions.
UX design holo user experience niye kaj kora — mane product ta use korte kemon lagbe, easy naki confusing, sheta design kora. Research, wireframe, testing shob e UX er part.
A UX designer researches user behavior, creates wireframes and prototypes, and tests designs to ensure the product is user-friendly. It's all about solving problems for the user.
UX design is the process of designing products that provide meaningful and relevant experiences to users. It involves research, information architecture, interaction design, and usability testing.
